channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Soyuz MS-29 Successfully Launches and DocksWith the ISS in 2026
item.description: The Soyuz MS-29 spacecraft successfully launched on July 14, 2026, at 14:47 UTC from Baikonur Cosmodrome's PU-6 ramp, marking the first Soyuz launch of the year and the 75th mission to the Internation...

item.title: Rent and Income Disparity in South African Townships
item.description: The PayProp Rental Index reports that South Africa's average monthly rent is R9,462, based on formal transactions nationwide. However, this figure masks significant disparities, particularly in townsh...

item.title: Unemployed Man Kills Grandmother After Months of Arguments Over Joblessness
item.description: A 24-year-old man in Bengaluru, Prajwal, was arrested for murdering his maternal grandmother, D Gowramma, aged 70, after prolonged conflicts over his unemployment. The incident occurred after months o...

item.title: Assembly of First Nations urges criminalization of residential school denialism to address hate crimes
item.description: The Assembly of First Nations (AFN) has passed an emergency resolution demanding Canada criminalize residential school denialism, a stance supported by Indigenous leaders who argue it perpetuates hate...

item.title: No Winners in PCSO's Major Lotto Jackpots on July 15, 2026
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that there were no winners for the major lotto jackpot prizes on Wednesday, July 15, 2026. Both the Grand Lotto 6/55 and Megalotto 6/45 jackp...

item.title: Property Dealers Arrested After Double Murder in MP's Aishbagh
item.description: Two property brokers, Shrikant Chinchaliya (40) and Shashikant Chinchaliya (35), have been arrested for allegedly murdering a retired railway official, Hemant Philomen, and his wife, Shakuntala Barik,...

item.title: Tanzania Introduces New Funding Model for Higher Education
item.description: Tanzania is undergoing a significant transformation in its higher education funding system as the government explores alternative financial mechanisms to address rising costs and expanding student pop...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's 'Odyssey' reimagines Homeric epic with modern themes of war and disillusionment
item.description: Christopher Nolan's adaptation of Homer's *Odyssey* is a sweeping cinematic reworking that explores the psychological toll of war through the journey of Odysseus. The film blends grand-scale battle se...

item.title: JD Vance Struggles to Secure Republican Support for Trump's Reconciliation Package
item.description: JD Vance's efforts to persuade Republicans to back Trump's $95 billion reconciliation package have failed, according to a new report. The package includes $67 billion for defense, $20 billion for agri...

item.title: Microsoft Addresses 570 Security Vulnerabilities, Including Zero-Day Flaws, via AI-Driven Patches
item.description: Microsoft has released critical security patches addressing 570 vulnerabilities across its systems, including three zero-day flaws already being exploited in the wild. The update, part of a broader in...

item.title: Tanzania boosts legal capacity for contract management and AI challenges
item.description: State attorneys across Tanzania have undergone specialized training to enhance their ability to manage strategic contracts and address emerging technological challenges, including artificial intellige...

item.title: Ontario Canoeists Rescued After Being Trapped by Wildfire
item.description: Two canoeists stranded by a rapidly spreading wildfire in northwestern Ontario were rescued after a harrowing two-day ordeal. Bruce Hyer, owner of Wabakimi Wilderness lodge, described the situation as...

item.title: Nigeria's women leaders push for constitutional changes to boost political representation
item.description: The article discusses ongoing efforts by Nigerian women leaders and lawmakers to push for constitutional reforms aimed at increasing female representation in politics. Current data shows women occupy ...

item.title: England WAGs heartbroken after Argentina World Cup semi-final defeat
item.description: The heartbroken England WAGs were seen consoling their partners in the stands as Argentina knocked the Three Lions out of the World Cup on Wednesday night. Megan Pickford, wife of goalkeeper Jordan Pi...

item.title: Toronto Street Festival Shooting Sparks Calls for Transparency and Safety Measures
item.description: A shooting incident at the Salsa on St. Clair street festival in Toronto has left two people dead and five injured, sparking calls for greater transparency from police and discussions about public saf...

item.title: Government's Expanded 4PH Program Delivers 8,000 Homes to Filipino Families
item.description: The Department of Human Settlements and Urban Development (DHSUD) and the Pag-IBIG Fund have successfully turned over 8,000 housing units under the Expanded 4PH Program in Tarlac, marking significant ...

item.title: Burundi and Mali's Authoritarian Tactics: Blaming External Enemies to Sustain Power
item.description: The article explores how Burundi and Mali, both authoritarian regimes, employ a shared strategy of blaming external enemies to consolidate power. Burundi's President Évariste Ndayishimiye visited Burk...

item.title: Australia Introduces New AI Regulations to Balance Innovation and Protection
item.description: The Australian government has announced plans to establish AI standards and a dedicated AI office by 2027, aiming to balance technological advancement with safeguards for households, workers, and crea...

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup quarterfinal fixtures announced
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup has advanced to the quarterfinal stage, with the last-eight matches scheduled across multiple locations in the United States. The fixtures, listed in South African time, includ...

item.title: Michael Steele Criticizes Todd Blanche's Testimony on Judicial War Comments
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faced intense scrutiny during a House Appropriations Subcommittee hearing, where former Republican Party chairman Michael Steele accused him of misleading lawmaker...
